AI.title: Sperm donors need limits, says a European fertility group
AI.summary: Ties van der Meer doesn’t know how many siblings he has. The 47-year-old was conceived at a private fertility clinic in the Netherlands using sperm provided by an anonymous donor. After the Netherlands banned anonymous donation in 2004, the doctor who ran the clinic destroyed records that might have…

AI.title: Meta turns off the Instagram feature that let users make AI deepfakes of public accounts
AI.summary: Following significant backlash, Meta is turning off the feature it announced this week that let users generate AI images based on content from public Instagram accounts just by tagging them. The feature, as originally set up, meant that content from any public Instagram account could be used in AI c…

AI.title: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
AI.summary: Apple has sued OpenAI, alleging that engineers stole Apple secrets to advance the AI startup's hardware plans. AI.title: OpenAI’s Head of Safety Is Leaving the Company
AI.summary: Johannes Heidecke’s departure comes as OpenAI tries to further integrate its research and safety teams.

游戏.summary: Ubisoft has announced that Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced has passed 2 million copies sold in its first day since launch.

游戏.summary: EA has confirmed plans to remove "all paid progression options from Road to Glory and Online Dynasty" in EA Sports College Football 27 after players launched the CFBPlayNotPay campaign against offline microtransactions.

游戏.summary: Palworld players have spotted that developer Pocketpair has altered several Pal designs for the 1.0 launch, leaving some saying they now look less like the Pokémon they had resembled.

科技.title: US cybersecurity agency CISA had to build its incident playbook during the incident, agency reveals
科技.summary: Independent cybersecurity journalist Brian Krebs reported in May that a security researcher with cyber firm GitGuardian alerted him to reams of exposed passwords stored in a publicly accessible GitHub repository, which an employee of a CISA contractor had uploaded.

科技.title: Phia accused of ‘cookie stuffing,’ taking affiliate credit on purchases it didn’t earn
科技.summary: Phia, the shopping startup founded by Bill Gates’ daughter, Phoebe, and her friend Sophia Kianni is under fire for a practice known as “cookie stuffing,” which helped the product receive commissions and credit for sales it did not actually generate, per a Bloomberg investigation.

科技.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
科技.summary: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it's no longer available."

科技.title: Bluesky’s interim CEO, Toni Schneider, drops the ‘interim’
科技.summary: Schneider, who formerly served as the CEO of Automattic and is a partner at True Ventures, says he is "all in" on the unconventional social media platform.

科技.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
科技.summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

科技.title: Filing: College app Fizz accuses VC of sharing confidential startup information with rival Sidechat
科技.summary: Fizz has expanded its lawsuit against rival Sidechat, alleging that a Maveron VC shared its confidential information obtained during a fundraising meeting with the competing startup.

科技.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
科技.summary: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

科技.title: A new app, HyperTexting, turns the open web into a scrollable social media-like feed
科技.summary: HyperTexting's new app aims to make the open web feel more like social media by turning websites, blogs, newsletters, and podcasts into a scrollable feed, while also making it easier to post to your own website.

科技.title: China is catching up to Elon Musk’s reusable rockets
科技.summary: China's state-owned space company recovered its first orbital rocket booster after launch.

科技.title: Disney+ is considering a free streaming tier, report says
科技.summary: The launch of free content would allow Disney+ to better compete with free services like YouTube and Tubi, which are capturing a growing share of consumers’ viewing time.

科技.title: Dumb Co dared me to trade my iPhone for a hacked flip phone
科技.summary: Dumb Co sells flip phones that sync to your smartphone, bridging the infinite connectivity of the iPhone and the unrealistic limitations of an early 2000s relic.

科技.summary: The massive round was co-led by ARCH Venture Partners, Spark Capital, and Khosla Ventures.

科技.title: Netflix could be planning ‘always-on’ live TV channels
科技.summary: Amid signs of slowing engagement,  Netflix is reportedly considering launching "always-on" live channels, giving subscribers something to tune into 24/7.

科技.title: EU threatens Meta with fines over addictive features on Facebook and Instagram
科技.summary: The tech giant is in breach of the Digital Services Act by focusing on features like infinite scroll, autoplay, push notifications, and the highly personalized recommendation algorithms, the European Commission said.

科技.title: Florida ransomware negotiator convicted for helping ransomware gang extort US companies
科技.summary: A third ransomware negotiator has been jailed for helping a notorious ransomware group extort American victim companies into paying the hackers.
